system.pageSubtitle: Source info · Providers · History retention · Local storage

scopeCallout.label: Scope
scopeCallout.desc: Changes to {{vendor}}'s baseUrl / apiKey / timeout affect these SKU prefixes:

source.title: Source · License
source.hint: This service is open-sourced under {{license}}. AGPL §13 requires operators to provide visitors with the matching source code.

history.title: Generation history retention
history.hint: No cron — every new generation triggers an opportunistic prune. Saving 0 in either knob below disables that dimension.
history.confirmPrune: Prune history rows that exceed the retention policy? This cannot be undone.
history.toastChecked: Already within retention — nothing to prune

storage.title: Local storage
storage.hint: Uploads and generation results land in the data dir below, served at /static/uploads/<key>. Mount it as a dedicated volume in production for easy backup. i2i / i2v auto-stage through DashScope's temp bucket — no extra setup.
storage.dataDirPlaceholderConfigured: DB value in effect — enter a new path to overwrite
storage.dataDirPlaceholderDefault: Not configured — enter a new path to overwrite
storage.dataDirResetTitle: Remove this DB field; revert to STORAGE_LOCAL_DATA_DIR or built-in default
storage.dataDirConfirmClear: Clear the DB value? It will revert to env / built-in default. Files already written under the old path are not auto-migrated.

providers.baseUrlResetTitle: Clear DB value, revert to default URL
providers.apiKeyPlaceholderConfigured: Current: {{mask}} · enter a new value to overwrite
providers.apiKeyPlaceholderEmpty: Not configured · enter sk-... and save
providers.apiKeyClearTitle: Remove the apiKey row from DB
providers.timeoutResetTitle: Clear DB value, revert to built-in default

dashscope.label: DashScope (Alibaba Bailian)

kindHints.video: Async video submit; polling fixed at 10 s

dashscope.timeoutsHint: Submit timeout per model kind. Polling is fixed at 10s. Empty = default; saved value ≥ 1s.
dashscope.baseUrlHint: DashScope (Bailian) gateway. Default https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com; international accounts use https://dashscope-intl.aliyuncs.com.
dashscope.apiKeyHint: Encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM). UI shows masked form only (e.g. sk-1de...0252). Edits take effect within ~30 seconds.
dashscope.clearKeyConfirm: Clear the DashScope API Key? Every Alibaba SKU (qwen-* / wan2.7-* / glm / deepseek / speech-* / fun-music) will fail to call.

openai.label: OpenAI-compatible

kindHints.video: OpenAI has no standard video API; kept for forward-compat

openai.timeoutsHint: Defaults are slightly wider (DALL-E 3 / GPT-image occasionally exceed 60 s). No video / audio provider yet — fields kept for forward-compat. Empty = default; saved value ≥ 1s.
openai.baseUrlHint: Any OpenAI Chat Completions / Images Generations gateway (OpenAI / OpenRouter / Together / Groq / vLLM). Must include /v1, no trailing slash.
openai.apiKeyHint: Encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM). UI shows masked form only. Once configured, openai-chat/<model> and openai-image/<model> become addable under Config.
openai.clearKeyConfirm: Clear the OpenAI API Key? Every openai-chat/* / openai-image/* SKU will fail to call.

volcengine.label: Volcengine (Ark Seedance)

kindHints.chat: Volcengine chat provider not wired yet; kept for future Doubao text models.
kindHints.video: Seedance 2.0 / 2.0 Fast submit; polling fixed at 10 s.

volcengine.timeoutsHint: Only video active today (Seedance 2.0 / 2.0 Fast). chat / image / audio fields kept for forward-compat. Polling is fixed at 10s.
volcengine.baseUrlHint: Volcengine Ark Seedance gateway. Default https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v3. Private proxies with matching path layout slot in too. Don't include /contents/... — provider appends it.
volcengine.apiKeyHint: Bearer token (use ARK_API_KEY for the official endpoint, proxy key for self-hosted). Encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM.
volcengine.ossWarning: Seedance i2v / r2v also needs Object Storage (OSS / TOS) configured below — without it, locally uploaded images can't be fetched by Volcengine servers and only t2v works.
volcengine.clearKeyConfirm: Clear the Volcengine API Key? Every doubao-seedance-* / seedance-* SKU will fail to call.

testConnection.label: Connectivity test
testConnection.titleKeyMissing: ⚠ Input is empty and nothing saved — will fail

network.title: Outbound proxy
network.hint: Affects every backend outbound HTTP call (DashScope / OpenAI / Volcengine, etc.). Empty = direct; set = everything routes through this proxy. Takes effect within ~30 seconds, no restart needed.
network.disabledHint: When checked, any configured URL is ignored and process.env.{HTTP,HTTPS,ALL}_PROXY is cleared at startup, forcing direct connections. Useful for diagnosing leaked shell env proxies.

oss.title: Object storage (OSS / TOS)
oss.hint: Stages locally uploaded files to a publicly reachable URL so URL-only vendors (Volcengine Seedance i2v / r2v) can fetch them. Without it, Seedance is limited to plain-text t2v. Credentials are encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM.
oss.endpointPlaceholder: Custom domain / VPC internal endpoint; empty = default
oss.accessKeyIdPlaceholder: Pull from the RAM sub-account console
oss.readyMessage: ✅ {{provider}} fully configured — Volcengine Seedance i2v / r2v ready
oss.notReadyMessage: ⚠ Missing AK / SK / bucket / region — staging not yet operational
oss.toastLoadFailed: Failed to load object storage settings

desktop.title: Desktop
desktop.browserOnlyHint: This section only applies in the desktop (Electron) build. You're currently viewing /admin/system in a browser — open the same page from the desktop app to change these settings.
desktop.intro: Desktop-only knobs that affect Chromium startup behaviour. Changes require a Canvas Flow restart to take effect.
desktop.gpuHint: On (default): forces hardware raster + skips Chromium's GPU blocklist; smoother canvas drag/zoom. Off: defer to Chromium's built-in GPU detection — occasionally more stable on old GPUs / iGPUs / VMs but usually slower.
desktop.restartHint: ⚠ Changes require a Canvas Flow restart (Chromium command-line switches are consumed once at process start).

config.importConfirm: Current canvas config has unsaved changes — import will overwrite. Continue?

page.title: Config
page.exportTitle: Export the current node / model catalog as shareable JSON
page.importTitle: Import a node / model catalog from JSON (full replace; preview first, then confirm)
page.dupValueAlert: Another model already uses value "{{value}}" — pick a different one
page.toastPreviewFailedFallback: Preview failed: file parse or server validation error

modelGrid.empty: No models for this node yet
modelGrid.valuePlaceholder: value (prefix decides routing: openai-image/… / wan2.* / qwen-* …)
modelGrid.valueTitle: The prefix tells the backend which provider to dispatch to — see the drawer for details

drawer.valueHint: After you rename `value`, existing canvas nodes that referenced the old value will show as "Unknown model" until reselected. To switch vendor (prefix), use "delete + add" instead.

providerCard.title: Provider settings · DashScope (Bailian)
providerCard.hint: Source of truth lives in DB table global_configs; the apiKey is encrypted with ENCRYPTION_KEY (AES-256-GCM) before storage. Changes take effect within ~30 seconds for every model call (the provider has a short cache). Empty input = no change; use the dedicated clear buttons to drop a value.
providerCard.apiKeyPlaceholderConfigured: Current: {{mask}} · enter a new value to overwrite
providerCard.apiKeyPlaceholderEmpty: Not configured · enter sk-... and save
providerCard.baseUrlResetTitle: Clear DB value, revert to default URL
providerCard.apiKeyClearTitle: Remove the apiKey row from DB
providerCard.clearKeyConfirm: Clear the API Key? Every model call will fail until you configure it again.
providerCard.timeoutsCaveat: submit calls only; polling stays fixed at 10s
providerCard.timeoutResetTitle: Clear DB value, revert to built-in default

kinds.imageHint: Async image submit; polling fixed at 10s
kinds.videoHint: Async video submit; polling fixed at 10s
